title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
